caption:
They say knowledge is power, but at my university, it’s also temptation. 👀

I’m Elena, a professor at the Sorbonne in Paris. Tonight was supposed to be a quiet review of the classics, but with Dr. Alessandro, it felt like a silent ball of fire. He sat across from me at the mahogany desk, our textbooks stacked like a fortress between us, yet his gaze didn’t blink.

I adjusted my silk blouse, feeling the cool fabric cling to my skin. The silk against my neck felt electric. My blazer was tailored just right, hugging my curves but hiding what I wanted him to imagine. The lamp flickered, casting shadows that danced across the leather of the chair. I leaned forward, letting the neckline of my blouse hint at the secrets hidden beneath.

“One more chapter,” I whispered, my voice barely audible. My fingers brushed his, and the spark was undeniable. The library was empty, save for us, and the air was thick with unsaid words. He smiled, a dangerous, knowing look in his eyes. Slowly, his hand found my waist, tracing the curve of my skirt. I could feel his breath on my neck, hot and inviting.

We spent the next hour not studying the Renaissance, but exploring the present. The scent of old paper and my perfume mixed, creating an intoxicating atmosphere. When the clock struck midnight, I knew he wasn’t ready to leave. Not yet.

#ProfessorElena #ParisUniversity #LateNightStudy #CampusSecrets #CurvyTeacher #AcademicVibes #SilkBlouse #ForbiddenKnowledge #FrenchStyle #InstaStory
